2604.16503.title: Motif-Video 2B: Technical Report
2604.16503.paper_summary: Training strong video generation models usually requires massive datasets, large parameter counts, and substantial compute. In this work, we ask whether strong text-to-video quality is possible at a much smaller budget: fewer than 10M clips and less than 100,000 H200 GPU hours. Our core claim is that part of the answer lies in how model capacity is organized, not only in how much of it is used. In video generation, prompt alignment, temporal consistency, and fine-detail recovery can interfere with one another when they are handled through the same pathway. Motif-Video 2B addresses this by separating these roles architecturally, rather than relying on scale alone. The model combines two key ideas. First, Shared Cross-Attention strengthens text control when video token sequences become long. Second, a three-part backbone separates early fusion, joint representation learning, and detail refinement. To make this design effective under a limited compute budget, we pair it with an efficient training recipe based on dynamic token routing and early-phase feature alignment to a frozen pretrained video encoder. Our analysis shows that later blocks develop clearer cross-frame attention structure than standard single-stream baselines. On VBench, Motif-Video~2B reaches 83.76\%, surpassing Wan2.1 14B while using 7$\times$ fewer parameters and substantially less training data. These results suggest that careful architectural specialization, combined with an efficiency-oriented training recipe, can narrow or exceed the quality gap typically associated with much larger video models.
2604.16503.paper_summary_zh: 訓練強大的視頻生成模型通常需要大量數據集、大量參數和可觀的計算資源。在這項工作中，我們探討在更小的預算下是否能實現強大的文本到視頻質量：少於 1000 萬個片段和少於 100,000 小時的 H200 GPU。我們的核心主張是，部分答案在於模型容量的組織方式，而不僅僅是使用了多少容量。在視頻生成中，提示對齊、時間一致性和細節恢復在通過同一路徑處理時可能會相互干擾。Motif-Video 2B 通過在架構上分離這些角色來解決這個問題，而不是僅僅依賴於規模。該模型結合了兩個關鍵思想。首先，Shared Cross-Attention 在視頻標記序列變長時加強了文本控制。其次，三部分骨幹分離了早期融合、聯合表示學習和細節精煉。為了在有限的計算預算下使這一設計有效，我們將其與基於動態標記路由和早期階段特徵對齊到一個凍結的預訓練視頻編碼器的高效訓練配方相結合。我們的分析顯示，後續區塊發展出比標準單流基準更清晰的跨幀注意結構。在 VBench 上，Motif-Video~2B 達到 83.76\%，超越了 Wan2.1 14B，同時使用了 7$\times$ 更少的參數和大幅減少的訓練數據。這些結果表明，仔細的架構專門化，結合以效率為導向的訓練配方，可以縮小或超越通常與更大視頻模型相關的質量差距。
2604.16503.author: Junghwan Lim et.al.
